sulfate_roasting_train_lepidolite: Basis is wet cake at 80 wt% solids; train delivers a roasted calcine suitable for downstream water leach around 80°C; Dominant utility is thermal fuel for moisture removal + heating solids to roast temperature.
water_leach: Continuous, agitated leach of roasted calcine using water at ~80°C.
